case_title: RAMON CAAMAL CUXIM VS. SURIYA SRITHONG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUXIM, RAMON CAAMAL AS TO DEFENDANT SRITHONG, SURIYA DBA SURIYA THAI RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUXIM, RAMON CAAMAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SRITHONG, SURIYA DBA SURIYA THAI RESTAURANT $37,312.58 PRINCIPAL, $596.87 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38,319.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
